_comment: REA editorial layer — hand-edited and committed by you. Survives every weekly data refresh from palegis.us. Three keys: (1) coopTerritory: which legislators have co-ops in their district, with a short detail string shown on the profile banner; (2) starred: legislators that appear in Bookmarks > Starred; (3) reaBills: bill numbers (matching the format in bills.json) that should be highlighted as REA-relevant. Add or remove freely; the prototype merges these in at load time.

yaw.detail: 4 co-ops · Tri-County, Sullivan County, Claverack, Wellsboro
